skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: AI-powered video production agent that creates short videos (5-120 seconds) for product ads, social media content, brand videos, and explainers.
skill.summary: Delegates video creation to Pexo AI backend - handles scriptwriting, shot composition, transitions, and music automatically.
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged 534 patterns across shell scripts and documentation files. All findings are FALSE POSITIVEs - legitimate DevOps patterns for API-driven video production. Shell command substitution is standard bash scripting for curl/jq operations. Environment variable access is for user-provided API keys stored in ~/.pexo/config. Network calls target only pexo.ai domain. No command injection, credential exfiltration, or malicious patterns detected.

low_findings.title: External command execution in shell scripts
low_findings.description: Shell scripts use command substitution $(...) and backticks for curl/jq operations. This is standard bash scripting pattern, not a security vulnerability. All commands operate with hardcoded arguments - no user input injection vectors detected.

low_findings.title: API key stored in config file
low_findings.description: API key stored in ~/.pexo/config file. This is user-provided credential for the Pexo service. The skill does not exfiltrate credentials - only uses them to authenticate with pexo.ai.

low_findings.title: Network requests to external API
low_findings.description: Scripts make HTTPS requests to pexo.ai domain. This is the intended functionality - a video production API client. All endpoints are documented and expected.

content.value_statement: Transform text prompts and images into professional short videos using Pexo AI. Handles scriptwriting, composition, and editing automatically - no video production skills required.
actual_capabilities: Creates 5-120 second videos in multiple aspect ratios (16:9, 9:16, 1:1)
Accepts image, video, and audio file uploads as references
Polls Pexo backend for production progress and delivers final video
Handles credit errors and provides purchase guidance
Supports revisions using existing project IDs
Provides project links and download URLs for completed videos
limitations: Cannot crawl web URLs - files must be downloaded first then uploaded
Video production takes 15-20 minutes for short videos
Requires valid Pexo API key and sufficient credits
Does not support real-time video editing - changes require new production cycle

use_cases.title: Product Marketing Videos
use_cases.description: Create promotional videos for products by uploading product photos and describing the desired style. Pexo handles scriptwriting, transitions, and music selection automatically.

use_cases.title: Social Media Content
use_cases.description: Generate TikTok, Instagram Reels, or YouTube Shorts content from text descriptions. Supports vertical (9:16) and square (1:1) aspect ratios optimized for social platforms.
use_cases.target_user: Content creators and social media managers

use_cases.title: Explainer Videos
use_cases.description: Transform documentation, guides, or concepts into short explainer videos. Upload diagrams or screenshots as visual references for Pexo to incorporate.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Video Request
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 30 second product video for my new running shoes. I want it to feel energetic and modern for Instagram.
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants a simple product video with specific platform and mood requirements

prompt_templates.title: Video with Reference Image
prompt_templates.prompt: Make a brand video using this logo image <original-image>a_abc123</original-image>. The style should be professional and corporate for our website homepage.
prompt_templates.scenario: User provides reference assets to incorporate into the video

prompt_templates.title: Social Media Clip Series
prompt_templates.prompt: Create three 15 second TikTok clips from this product launch. Use vertical format and include text overlays for key features.
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants multiple short clips optimized for a specific social platform

prompt_templates.title: Revision Request
prompt_templates.prompt: The video looks great but can we make the transitions smoother and add more upbeat music? Keep everything else the same.
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants to refine an existing video with specific feedback

output_examples.input: Create a 30 second product video for my new running shoes for Instagram
Use this product photo <original-image>a_xyz789</original-image> to make a 20 second explainer video
output: Pexo will incorporate the product photo into the video composition

best_practices: Always wrap uploaded asset IDs in proper tags like <original-image>asset_id</original-image> - bare asset IDs are ignored
Wait at least 60 seconds between status polls during video production to avoid rate limits
Send the final video URL as plain text with full query parameters - truncated URLs will return 403 errors
Consolidate multiple requests into one message to minimize token costs
anti_patterns: Do not add duration, aspect ratio, or style details the user did not mention - Pexo's AI makes better creative decisions
Do not call pexo-chat.sh during WAIT status - only poll with pexo-project-get.sh to avoid duplicate production
Do not wrap video URLs in markdown links - some platforms break the URL and prevent playback
Do not skip polling updates - send brief status messages every 5 minutes during long waits

faq.question: How do I get a Pexo API key?
faq.answer: Visit https://pexo.ai and log in (or sign up). Click your avatar in the top-right corner, select API Keys, then Create Key. Copy the key and add it to ~/.pexo/config as PEXO_API_KEY.

faq.question: Why is my video taking so long to generate?
faq.answer: Video production typically takes 15-20 minutes for short videos. Complex or longer videos may take more time. The skill polls every 60 seconds and will notify you when complete.

faq.question: What happens if I run out of credits?
faq.answer: When credits are insufficient, the skill will show an error with a purchase link. Visit https://pexo.ai/home, click Credits in the top-right, then Buy Credits to add more.

faq.question: Can I use images from URLs?
faq.answer: Pexo cannot crawl web URLs directly. Download the image first, then upload it using pexo-upload.sh. The skill will handle this automatically when you provide a URL.

faq.question: How do I make revisions to an existing video?
faq.answer: Use the same project_id from your original video. Run pexo-chat.sh with your feedback (e.g., 'make the transitions smoother'). The skill will poll for the revised video.

faq.question: What file formats are supported for upload?
faq.answer: Images: jpg, png, webp, bmp, tiff, heic. Videos: mp4, mov, avi. Audio: mp3, wav, aac, m4a, ogg, flac. Maximum file sizes and duration limits apply based on your Pexo plan.
